page_metadata.bioconda__summary: IDBA is a practical iterative De Bruijn Graph De Novo Assembler for sequence assembly in bioinformatics.
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: A short read assembler based on iterative de bruijn graph. it is developed under 64-bit linux, but should be suitable for all unix-like system.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: A short read assembler based on iterative De Bruijn graph. It is developed under 64-bit Linux, but should be suitable for all unix-like system.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A short read assembler based on iterative De Bruijn graph. It is developed under 64-bit Linux, but should be suitable for all unix-like system.
page_metadata.galaxy__summary: Wrappers for the idba assembler variants.
page_metadata.galaxy__bio_tools_summary: A short read assembler based on iterative De Bruijn graph. It is developed under 64-bit Linux, but should be suitable for all unix-like system.
